recentTweets.text:
The Cuban regime holds hundreds of political prisoners who dared to question the regime on July 11, 2021. They must be freed unconditionally.

Proud to have partners like @carolinabferrer with us in the fight to deliver Cubans from brutality, repression, and corruption. https://t.co/axGLj4gq7v

Six years ago, we lost my mentor and friend, Rep. John Lewis. He wasn’t just a lawmaker, he was a brave freedom fighter who led and tutored the next generation of civil rights and social justice activists. https://t.co/7Jbk9ILTRq

Join me and housing experts at 7:30PM on Monday, July 20, for a town hall where we'll discuss the rising cost of housing and what I'm doing to fix it.

RSVP here: https://t.co/pqd9CSXOpf https://t.co/VP7nYCVtfw

ICE left a 3-year-old U.S. citizen child with a violent relative after deporting his mother with no due process. He was murdered as a result.

Today, I joined colleagues in sponsoring Orlin's Law to block ICE from ripping Florida families apart and putting kids in danger.

Today, enough House Republicans stood with all House Democrats to defeat the largest veterans benefit cut in American history.

I will always work to help our veterans, but I will never hurt some veterans to benefit others.

As co-chairs of the Caucus on Black-Jewish Relations, @RepNikema and I convened colleagues to learn more about the Rosenwald School Project.

We must continue the history of Black and Jewish Americans standing together to promote of education, social justice and civil rights. https://t.co/p1crYGxDyJ

The Republican State Department funding bill does nothing to rein in Trump's corruption or his illegal war.

Instead, it gives Trump a $1.5 billion slush fund and ransacks lifesaving programs. I voted no. https://t.co/qIFeQltETt

Trump guts global health programs that keep people around the world healthy. Infectious diseases don’t respect borders, and his recklessness puts America in danger.

Great to meet @RESULTS_Tweets and fight to eradicate HIV/AIDS, Tuberculosis, and Malaria alongside them. https://t.co/YYpKEoqKz7

Joan Sebastian Guerrero passed a background check and earned a work permit. ICE agents executed him without a warrant.

They're not going after "the worst of the worst." They're killing people in the street without a trial.

How many more must die before Republicans rein in ICE?

Be careful what you eat. Trump's DOGE scam recklessly cut a food illness tracking program.

Now, cyclosporiasis cases are up and causing explosive diarrhea and serious illness.

Here are tips to ensure your food is safer after Trump's safety net sabotage left us all less secure. https://t.co/2OydFvHJ79

Great to honor amazing community members who lift up the least among us and inspire young people to causes bigger than themselves at Bad Girlz and Bad Boyz for Christ.

Their work makes a big difference in so many lives across Broward County and beyond. https://t.co/zELTyQgjLw

My top priority is making sure life is more affordable. Whether it’s fighting costly, illegal Trump tariffs or protecting Social Security and Medicare, Democrats stand up for our seniors.

Glad to join The Pointe at Plantation to share my work for them. https://t.co/y3sg8VfUB7

Hardworking Haitian TPS recipients are critical to our economy in South Florida.

The Supreme Court's decision to let Trump rip legal status away from hardworking, law-abiding immigrants will only make life more expensive for all of us. https://t.co/8uTjnisG49

The Supreme Court decision to revoke TPS from law-abiding immigrants is the direct result of electing a racist president.

Trump has been after Haitians since day one.

Haitians deserve an extension of TPS and a real path to lawful status. I'll keep fighting until they get it. https://t.co/19FZlunP2L
RT @freedomhouse: Imprisoned for his activism and art, Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara should be free; instead, his whereabouts are unknown.…

Hace cinco años, decenas de miles de valientes patriotas cubanos salieron a las calles para exigir su libertad del comunismo.

The fight for freedom continues to this day. It lives on in the voices of the brave dissidents who say: enough is enough. #SOSCuba https://t.co/LjI0Oo5Wso

Trump lets polluters dump cancer-causing chemicals into our water, but MAHA stays silent.

If we truly want to Make America Healthy Again, we need to start with clean drinking water. https://t.co/H6ZvKS6VOB

“It is categorically false that we would pressure someone to self-deport”

Oh really? Please explain the countless posts threatening people with violence if they don’t self-deport. https://t.co/4qrbMIVmp7

Advocates sounded the alarm about the Miramar ICE facility, so I made a surprise oversight inspection to see for myself.

They were right. Men and women are being crammed into an office building. We need to overhaul ICE and stop these abuses. https://t.co/OVjDWHpibM

ICE agents shot and killed Lorenzo Salgado Araujo on his way to work, and now they’re trying to make the witnesses disappear.

This is mafia behavior. We need an independent investigation and restrictions on ICE use of force.
Watch my full press conference: https://t.co/LyQ3qO9XQe

Drowning is a public health crisis, and we must treat it like one.

Florida had 119 child drownings in 2025 - the deadliest year ever - and is on pace for more in 2026.

I've secured over $30M for drowning prevention and will fight for more swim safety measures to save lives. https://t.co/gNuMaXiDR0

The 14th Amendment was ratified 158 years ago to enshrine birthright citizenship for all Americans, especially formerly enslaved Black Americans.

We must continue working to protect this Constitutional right and reject extremist attempts to strip citizenship from Americans.
RT @PIFCoalition: Thanks, @RepDWStweets, for cosponsoring the LIFT the BAR Act, urgent and important legislation to lower barriers to healt…

I filed an amendment to ban ICE racial profiling and bring these racist Kavanaugh stops to an end. Every single Republican on the committee voted no.

The consequences are deadly.

Republicans want to reverse decades of bipartisan consensus and expand offshore drilling. Floridians know firsthand the dangerous results of disasters like the Deepwater Horizon oil spill. 

As Democrats fight to lower energy costs, Republicans are moving backwards. https://t.co/HKQb6g0L5J

Federal judges are right to strike down DeSantis’s horrible Stop WOKE Act & call his ban on discussing race & gender a “breathtaking assertion of power.”

Silencing students hurts their ability to fight discrimination. This ruling says MAGA can’t erase Black or LGBTQ+ history.

The overcrowding at the Miramar ICE facility needs to be addressed. This office isn't designed to detain people, and the result was horrific.

When I conducted a surprise oversight inspection, conditions were inhumane. I'll keep the pressure on until that changes. https://t.co/H8WzycSodI

We're in a cost of living crisis but instead of making things more affordable, Trump wants Americans to fund his vanity Arch.

If he truly wanted to honor our veterans, he should support operations at Arlington Cemetery or properly invest in VA healthcare. https://t.co/z3JaNsFCxq

I conducted a surprise oversight inspection to the Miramar ICE facility last week. The overcrowding was unacceptable and multiple emergency vehicles arrived in the short time I was there.

I'll continue to spotlight these inhumane facilities until serious ICE reforms are made. https://t.co/vbU1h0si54

As housing costs skyrocket, I’m working to lower them and keep Florida families safe. 

My bipartisan Making Condos Safer and Affordable Act will do just that. https://t.co/rLzWA1Go2u

Great to meet with the Nancy J. Cotterman Center, who provide critical services to survivors of sexual assault, child abuse and human trafficking in Broward.

I’m grateful for their work to bring justice and resources to victims and will keep fighting to fully fund this mission. https://t.co/EE9sUvqtZX

Trump cares more about his personal vanity projects than families' well-being, and said housing cost concerns are a "big yawn."

Democrats will keep fighting to make life more affordable, even if Republicans refuse to. https://t.co/t6pCJ3tpH5

Thanks to Trump’s tariffs and Iran war, your summer cookout and vacation cost a lot more. Average backyard barbecues spiked 13%, four times more than the inflation rate.

I'm fighting non-stop to end Trump's illegal trade war and costly conflicts. https://t.co/d4rRGyfNEJ

Happy Independence Day, Broward County!

This Fourth of July, let’s appreciate the freedoms we all cherish and build on the founding ideals that make our nation great by protecting them. https://t.co/tEA2WaWtu0

Republicans don't care about your kitchen-table costs.

As you struggle to buy gas and groceries, they eat lobster and ribeyes.

Republicans just don't care about our high costs. https://t.co/AK6PQq9fU1

One year ago today, House Republicans passed their Big, Ugly Bill into law.

Since then?
8 million Americans kicked off healthcare.
4 million Americans kicked off food assistance.

Republicans made our affordability crisis worse. Democrats are working to fix it. https://t.co/eoQTOUqebe
RT @MiamiHerald: ‘Horrific’: Lawmaker denounces conditions at Miramar ICE office as detentions ramp up https://t.co/2eEQzl9RgN
Watch my full press conference: https://t.co/8BUiaqqfDB

I just conducted a surprise oversight visit at the Miramar ICE facility, where advocates sounded the alarm about unsafe conditions for both detainees and officers.

This is what I saw. https://t.co/CbPnL9Xaok

RT @RepGlennIvey: The people who keep Capitol Hill running deserve fair wages, good benefits, and a secure retirement. 

My colleagues and…
https://t.co/s3Gsbgf3i9

The collapse of Surfside's Champlain Towers rocked our South Florida community five years ago. We can't let that happen again.

My bipartisan Making Condos Safer and Affordable Act ensures condominium associations can afford to make pressing repairs and keep residents safe. https://t.co/jGlWWtMz3u
RT @HouseDPCC: Trump thinks the housing crisis is a yawn. Republicans don't care if you're struggling as long as they get to go home early…

Proud to join @unitehere Local 23 workers on the picket line this week.

I'll always stand up for workers' right to organize and stand in solidarity in the fight for fair contracts. https://t.co/Y2QyL9uI9u

To close out Pride Month, I proudly joined my @EqualityCaucus colleagues on the House floor to honor the LGBTQ+ community's amazing contributions.

I'll always help lead the charge to stop MAGA extremist attacks on this vibrant community, in Florida and Washington. https://t.co/saK10OCqBH
RT @FrankPallone: Honored to welcome members of the Jewish War Veterans to the Capitol today and present them with my resolution recognizin…

Proud to join @HouseDemocrats to highlight our victory in court today to protect birthright citizenship.

This was a major win, but the fight continues. I'll always defend birthright citizenship and fight for an immigration system that works. https://t.co/gpW4rfek7D
RT @ASTRO_org: Thank you Congresswoman Debbie Wasserman Schultz (D-FL) for signing on as a co-sponsor of the Radiation Oncology Case Rate (…

SCOTUS rejected Trump’s lawless attack on birthright citizenship, but the 6-3 split is disturbing. The 14th amendment is clear and this should be a 9-0 slam dunk.  

We cannot allow extremists in the White House or on the Court to shred the Constitution and rip away citizenship.

My constituents are worried about skyrocketing bills, but Republicans have no answer. They can't win elections with their high-cost chaos, so they try to rig the rules.

Trump made it clear when he blocked a bill to bring housing costs down to push his voter suppression agenda. https://t.co/RVRLkM1uZc

RT @riley_rogerson: From the Witkoff-Rubio House briefing: 

Rep. Debbie Wasserman Schultz pressed the admin on Iran sanctions lifting. Aft…
RT @meredithllee: NEW — GOP Rep. Darrell Issa pressed Rubio and Witkoff on the fate of Iran’s enriched uranium on a briefing call today.…

SCOTUS's decision to rip legal status away from hundreds of thousands of law-abiding immigrants is a moral and economic disaster.

@RepDarrenSoto and I were live to discuss what it means for Florida, and look ahead at SCOTUS's upcoming Birthright Citizenship decision. https://t.co/XXUFHT4Vs8
RT @HouseDemocrats: Immigrant Heritage Month is a time to celebrate the immigrant communities who have helped shape and enrich our country,…

Republicans neglect real election security infrastructure as they push their voter suppression bill.

Their assault on free elections doesn't help Americans pay their bills. But if Trump can't convince people to vote for his failed agenda, he's happy to suppress their vote. https://t.co/PGstcRegfS

Happy Immigrant Heritage Month!

Whether it’s my family, my many Latin American & Caribbean constituents, or anyone else across our nation, the immigrant story is central to the America we know today. I'll always fight to protect our immigrant neighbors & keep families together. https://t.co/AT6s22kQCz

57 years ago, a group of brave LGBTQ+ Americans at the Stonewall Inn stood up to hate and injustice.

Today, we celebrate their contributions to making America a more welcoming and inclusive place for everyone, no matter who you love. #PrideisaProtest https://t.co/bY1Ln8GvWk

After the Supreme Court decision to rip away TPS from law-abiding Haitians, it has never been more urgent to protect our hardworking neighbors from ICE brutality and provide a lawful pathway to permanent status.

I intend to do that, and my new TPS Review Act will help. https://t.co/sTOVaXw5Ql

Trump sends his ICE thugs into our communities to snatch people up because they have an accent, or work a job that Stephen Miller thinks is for immigrants.

We can't have reckless, untrained ICE agents roaming our streets until real reforms are made. https://t.co/mb0gOleoWW

kurdistanMentions.text:
Republicans want to reverse decades of bipartisan consensus and expand offshore drilling. Floridians know firsthand the dangerous results of disasters like the Deepwater Horizon oil spill. 

As Democrats fight to lower energy costs, Republicans are moving backwards. https://t.co/HKQb6g0L5J

SCOTUS allowed the termination of TPS for law-abiding Haitian and Syrian immigrants yesterday, despite Trump's openly racist motivations.

So I'm sponsoring TPS Review Act to restore checks and balances on the President’s handling of TPS, because nobody is above the law. 🧵

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 2 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Debbie Wasserman Schultz. The social-media posture reads as kurdistan-adjacent regional signal because the strongest matched frame is Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy, Syria / Rojava.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 1 supportive or diplomatic hit, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 1 energy/economic hit in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-07-08T14:10:00Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
assessment.dominantFrame: Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language

Today, we celebrate their contributions to making America a more welcoming and inclusive place for everyone, no matter who you love. #PrideisaProtest https://t.co/bY1Ln8GvWk

After the Supreme Court decision to rip away TPS from law-abiding Haitians, it has never been more urgent to protect our hardworking neighbors from ICE brutality and provide a lawful pathway to permanent status.

I intend to do that, and my new TPS Review Act will help. https://t.co/sTOVaXw5Ql

Trump sends his ICE thugs into our communities to snatch people up because they have an accent, or work a job that Stephen Miller thinks is for immigrants.

We can't have reckless, untrained ICE agents roaming our streets until real reforms are made. https://t.co/mb0gOleoWW

Under this bill, TPS recipients would maintain their status and work permits automatically and indefinitely while a termination is litigated in court, eliminating the uncertainty that has harmed Florida businesses and consumers over the last year.
Watch my full announcement from this morning: https://t.co/gYaOJP7cpv

SCOTUS allowed the termination of TPS for law-abiding Haitian and Syrian immigrants yesterday, despite Trump's openly racist motivations.

So I'm sponsoring TPS Review Act to restore checks and balances on the President’s handling of TPS, because nobody is above the law. 🧵

Trump is holding a bill to reduce housing costs hostage.

Congress passed the largest housing bill in decades to help make homeownership achievable again, but Trump refuses to sign it. He clearly doesn't care about affordability.

I'll keep fighting until the bill becomes law. https://t.co/tL9XcyEuk7

Today marks the 11th anniversary of Obergefell v. Hodges, the landmark Supreme Court decision affirming marriage equality for everyone nationwide, regardless of sexual orientation.

We celebrate this historic step forward and continue the fight for equal rights for all. https://t.co/j2t4nMdsA9

SCOTUS ignored Trump's open racism to imply that race was not a factor in the case to terminate TPS. We all know better.

I joined @RepPressley, @SenMarkey, @WhipKClark, & @RepMaxwellFrost outside the Supreme Court to denounce this decision & support our Haitian neighbors. https://t.co/aEpWr5rmli
Visit my website for resources: https://t.co/3mF1krJ0kI
RT @RepJeffries: WATCH: House Democrats hold a hearing on defending the right to vote in the aftermath of the Callais decision and standing…

Because Republicans have no answers to address the cost of living, they join Trump to assault free and fair elections.

Watch as I chair a @HouseDemocrats hearing on on how to best stand against GOP threats to our elections: https://t.co/vLnWefYMt7

I am heartbroken and infuriated by the Supreme Court’s despicable decision on TPS for Haitians and Syrians. I plan to introduce a bill to reverse this ruling.
